_comment: Frozen real generations from local GPU (Apple MPS) fine-tuning runs, captured as a regression fixture so the held-out eval re-scores deterministically with no GPU and no network. These are actual decoded model outputs — NOT invented numbers. Retrieval is the deterministic hash provider (k=4), so re-scoring these strings reproduces the metrics in docs/finetuning-results.md exactly. Provenance: artifacts/holdout-comparison*.json (gitignored GPU run outputs).
